title: oxalis hickenii
intro: Oxalis hickenii, also known as the Purple Wood Sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae). The leaves of the Oxalis hickenii plant contain oxalic acid, which has been used for its medicinal properties, including treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help protect against chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Oxalis hickenii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
